name: Asparagus Tomato Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 small Tomatoes, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a small bowl and stir until blended. Set aside.
2. Snap off the tough ends of the asparagus.
3. Remove scales from the stalks with a knife. Cut the asparagus diagonally into 1 1/2-inch pieces. Set aside.
4. Pour oil around the top of the preheated wok, coating the sides; heat at medium-high for 2 minutes.
5. Add the asparagus and green onions to the wok; stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
6. Add the mushrooms to the wok; stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Add the reserved cornstarch mixture to the vegetable mixture in the wok; cook until thickened and bubbly.
8. Add the tomatoes, and cook just until heated through.
9. Serve immediately.
